title: Personal Injury Demand Letter
text:
DEMAND LETTER

Re: Personal Injury Claim — John Mitchell v. Pacific Coast Insurance Group
Case No. CV-2024-08841

Dear Claims Adjuster,

I am writing on behalf of my client, John Mitchell, regarding the above-referenced personal injury claim arising from a motor vehicle accident that occurred on March 14, 2024.

The plaintiff maintains that liability is not in dispute. Mr. Mitchell was transported by ambulance to Springfield General Hospital, where he was treated by Dr. Sarah Chen.

Total medical damages: $45,750.00. This demand is made pursuant to Policy No. AIG-4471-XJ.

If we are unable to reach an amicable resolution, the undersigned will pursue all available legal remedies on behalf of the plaintiff, including the filing of a civil lawsuit per Exhibit C.

Emergency contact Robert Mitchell can be reached at (555) 867-5309.

Sincerely,
Attorney at Law
